overall.description: Static establishing shot of a medieval Gothic dining hall from a Harry Potter video game, featuring floating candles, long house tables filled with students in robes, and a prominent Gryffindor banner at the center. The scene is entirely stationary with subtle character animations.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall dining chamber with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the dining hall from the center aisle between the house tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes seated at the right table, occasionally turning head while dining
student in dark robes seated at the left table, facing toward the center aisle

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
red and gold house banner with lion crest hanging at the center of the hall
long wooden banquet tables lined with food and dining students extending down the hall
tall grey stone walls with Gothic architectural details
arched stained glass windows allowing natural light to filter into the hall
high vaulted stone ceiling with magical floating candles

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter game, showing the iconic dining chamber with floating candles illuminating long house tables filled with students. The Gryffindor banner hangs prominently at the center while students dine and converse at the tables lining both sides of the marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, immersive view of a medieval Gothic dining hall that maintains a consistent atmosphere of magical grandeur. It begins with a wide perspective of the Great Hall, where floating candles cast a warm glow over the expansive marble floor. As the eye settles on the scene, the focus remains on the long house tables where students in robes dine and converse in a lively hum of activity. The composition is anchored by a prominent Gryffindor banner hanging at the center, framing the symmetrical arrangement of the chamber. The scene concludes with the subtle, continuous animations of the students, preserving the stillness of the architectural space.
